title: setaria sphacelata var. aurea
intro: Setaria sphacelata var. aurea, also known as African millet or yellow bristle grass, is a type of annual grass native to tropical Africa, characterized by its bright yellow inflorescences. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Setaria sphacelata var. aurea include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in the form of a tea, infusion, or decoction, and can also be dried and used as a powder for medicinal purposes.
